issues.objection: Tags on 7.25 (observability, operator-system-coupling, instrumentation) cohere with same-tag verses across chapters. Coheres with chapter-7 thesis's surface-veils-substrate thread; anticipates Ch 8's metaphysical reach without claiming it. STRETCHED tagging keeps the operational scope honest where metaphysical reach exceeds it. The STRETCHED tag is honest for this verse: Verse claims a metaphysical concealment (yoga-māyā-samāvṛtaḥ). Engineering analog cannot inherit the metaphysical claim; operates at the operational scope of dashboards-as-designed-surfaces. Counter-example: senior gatekeeping is engineering pathology, not yoga-māyā at operational scope.

notes: Doctrine-coherence test for 7.25: same-tag verses across chapters preserve consistent stance; the verse extends the doctrine without contradicting prior chapters. PASS.
